# Pull Request Template

## 📋 Description
Brief description of the changes made in this PR.

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Test addition or update

## 🔧 Changes Made
- [ ] Change 1
- [ ] Change 2
- [ ] Change 3

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] VPN functionality tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Web scraping functionality tested (if applicable)

## 📱 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## 📝 Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is commented where necessary
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] All tests pass locally

## 🚀 Deployment Notes
Any special instructions for deployment or configuration changes.

## 📚 Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## 🔍 Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know.

---

**Daily Development PR - [Date]**
This PR represents the daily development work as part of the automated development workflow.
